targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.name,' - VM',1),'/',-1) AS Componente,
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.name,' - VM',1) AS Sistema,
  (SELECT ht.value FROM host_tag ht WHERE ht.hostid=h.hostid AND ht.tag='servico' LIMIT 1) AS Servico,
  ROUND((SELECT hh.value FROM history hh JOIN items ii ON ii.itemid=hh.itemid
     WHERE ii.hostid=h.hostid AND ii.key_='system.cpu.util' ORDER BY hh.clock DESC LIMIT 1),1) AS `CPU %`,
  ROUND((SELECT hh.value FROM history hh JOIN items ii ON ii.itemid=hh.itemid
     WHERE ii.hostid=h.hostid AND ii.key_ IN ('vm.memory.utilization','vm.memory.util') ORDER BY hh.clock DESC LIMIT 1),1) AS `Mem %`,
  (SELECT hu.value FROM history_uint hu JOIN items ii ON ii.itemid=hu.itemid
     WHERE ii.hostid=h.hostid AND ii.key_='icmpping' ORDER BY hu.clock DESC LIMIT 1) AS `ICMP`
FROM hosts h
JOIN hosts_groups hg ON hg.hostid=h.hostid
WHERE hg.groupid=689 AND h.status=0
ORDER BY Servico, Componente

panels.title: Saúde das VMs de Integração (CPU / Mem / disponibilidade)
